children.heading: ONCHIT
children.label: a ONCHIT
children.text: To the extent consistent with , all functions, personnel, assets, liabilities, and administrative actions applicable to the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology appointed under Executive Order No. 13335 or the Office of such National Coordinator on the date before , shall be transferred to the National Coordinator appointed under and the Office of such National Coordinator as of .section 300jj–11 of this titlesection 300jj–11(a) of this titleFebruary 17, 2009February 17, 2009

children.heading: National eHealth Collaborative
children.label: b National eHealth Collaborative
children.text: Nothing in sections 300jj–12 of this title or this subsection shall be construed as prohibiting the AHIC Successor, Inc. doing business as the National eHealth Collaborative from modifying its charter, duties, membership, and any other structure or function required to be consistent with section 300jj–12 and 300jj–13 of this title so as to allow the Secretary to recognize such AHIC Successor, Inc. as the HIT Advisory Committee.123So in original. Probably should be “section”.1So in original. Probably should be “sections”.2See References in Text note below.3

children.heading: Consistency of recommendations
children.label: c Consistency of recommendations
children.text: In carrying out , until recommendations are made by the HIT Advisory Committee, recommendations of the HIT Advisory Committee shall be consistent with the most recent recommendations made by such AHIC Successor, Inc.section 300jj–12(b)(2) of this title44So in original. See 2016 Amendment note below.4
